meta.summary: Sniffles2 2.8.0 runtime for long-read structural variant calling from sorted and indexed BAM/CRAM alignments.
meta.description: Sniffles2 2.8.0 runtime for long-read structural variant calling from sorted and indexed BAM/CRAM alignments.

test: sniffles --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'Sniffles2, Version 2.8.0' >/dev/null && sniffles --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Sniffles2: A fast structural variant (SV) caller' >/dev/null && sniffles --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--input SORTED_INPUT.bam' >/dev/null && sniffles --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--vcf OUTPUT.vcf' >/dev/null && sniffles --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--mosaic' >/dev/null && sniffles --expert-help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--tandem-repeats' >/dev/null

python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; assert md.version("sniffles") == "2.8.0"; import sniffles, pysam, edlib, psutil, numpy, spoa; print("sniffles-runtime-ok", md.version("pysam"), md.version("edlib"), md.version("psutil"), md.version("numpy"), md.version("pyspoa"))' | grep -F 'sniffles-runtime-ok' >/dev/null && python --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'Python 3.10.15' >/dev/null && samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools 1.22.1' >/dev/null && bgzip --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version: 1.' >/dev/null && tabix --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version: 1.' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-sniffles-call-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/sniffles/share/testdata/make_minimal_bam.py "$tmp/reads.bam"; cd "$tmp"; samtools quickcheck reads.bam; sniffles --input reads.bam --vcf calls.vcf --threads 1 --minsupport 1 --all-contigs > run.log 2>&1; test -s calls.vcf; grep -F '##fileformat=VCFv4.2' calls.vcf >/dev/null; grep -F '##source=Sniffles2_2.8.0' calls.vcf >/dev/null; grep -F '#CHROM' calls.vcf >/dev/null; grep -F 'Wrote 0 called SVs to calls.vcf' run.log >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-sniffles-snf-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python /opt/sniffles/share/testdata/make_minimal_bam.py "$tmp/reads.bam"; cd "$tmp"; sniffles --input reads.bam --snf sample.snf --threads 1 --minsupport 1 --all-contigs > run.log 2>&1; test -s sample.snf; grep -F 'Running Sniffles2, build 2.8.0' run.log >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: Sniffles2
upstream.citation: Smolka et al. 2024, Detection of mosaic and population-level structural variants with Sniffles2; Sedlazeck et al. 2018, Accurate detection of complex structural variations using single-molecule sequencing
